functions.name: LOAD_DETAIL
functions.description: Loads a stored employee-level payroll output value for one output key, month, and unit ID.

parameters.name: output_key
parameters.description: Config output key, for example payroll.output.base_salary_total.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Any Excel date in the forecast month.

parameters.name: user_key
parameters.description: Optional User ID/email. If omitted, the function uses the User ID from the Heavy Calc Assist task pane.
